channel.title: Segment-Tree on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Segment-Tree on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Matrix #1: Matrix Fast Power — Linear Recurrence, DP Semirings & Kitamasa
item.description: Matrix fast power for linear recurrences (4 patterns), 4 semiring templates (count/bool/min-plus/max-plus), matrix+segment tree for range-add Fibonacci queries, Kitamasa O(k²logn) and NTT O(k log²k logn).

item.title: Matrix #4: Matrix Problems — Fibonacci Subarray Sums, Gaussian Elimination & Expected Value
item.description: Hard matrix problems: Fibonacci squared subarray sum with segment-tree 4-tuple and companion matrix; cycle-decomposition partition state space for random-swap sorting, first-step analysis, and Gaussian elimination.
